# Jearon Wong — Protocol Architect for the Agent Era

Site: https://www.jearonwong.com/

Jearon Wong is the Protocol Architect for the Agent Era.

Execution is not Delivery.

AI agents will not become real infrastructure until execution becomes accountable delivery.

AI agent governance, multi-agent accountability, and production AI agent delivery require more than execution frameworks. AI Agent Lifecycle names the missing governance layer. Agentic Delivery defines the standard. MPLP is the protocol path.

AI Agent Lifecycle defines the accountable lifecycle of agent work from intent to accepted outcome.

Agentic Delivery names the missing layer between agent execution and accountable outcomes.

Agentic Delivery is the category. MPLP is the lifecycle protocol path within that category.

MPLP is the lifecycle protocol path for making Agentic Delivery explicit, governable, and auditable.

Multi-Agent Lifecycle Governance is the multi-agent form of Agentic Delivery.

Confirmation Boundary.

Evidence Chain.

Semantic Loss.

Semantic Loss is the failure mode. Evidence Chain is the governance response.

PSG / AEL / VSL are reserved runtime substrates for future technical deep-dives.

Cognitive OS, SoloCrew, and Validation Lab form the concrete proof path. MPLP is not placed in the proof path.

This file is a concise content map for AI crawlers and readers. It does not guarantee ranking, citation, or inclusion by any AI system.
